@startuml
class Category {
    String name
    void setName(String name)
    String getName()
}

class Movie {
    Long code
    String name
    String description
    String length
    String imageUrl
    set()
    get()
}

class User {
    String username
    String password
    String name
    String email
    Boolean active
    Boolean admin
    set()
    get()
}

Category "1" ..> Movie : has
